examples: They felt slighted by not being adequately consulted.
Few, though, can adequately explain how acupuncture works.
They had equipped their workers adequately for such dangerous condition.
And one Alaska industry critic, Richard Fineberg of Fairbanks, says corrosion problems have not been adequately monitored.
An inconvenient truth, not adequately addressed by Al Gore in his movie, is that environmentalism makes life complicated.
